_note: Label Sprint round for antibody — generated antibody_illus.webp, cropped/keyed dark mode.
caption: Tap each label, then tap where it belongs on the antibody.

hotspots.label: Antigen-binding site
hotspots.detail: The variable tip of each arm that recognises and binds a specific antigen.

hotspots.label: Light chain
hotspots.detail: The shorter polypeptide chain, present only in the upper arms.

hotspots.label: Heavy chain
hotspots.detail: The longer polypeptide chain, running through both arms and the stem.

hotspots.label: Hinge region
hotspots.detail: The flexible junction where the two arms meet the stem.

hotspots.label: Disulfide bond
hotspots.detail: Covalent -S-S- links holding the heavy and light chains together.

hotspots.label: Fc region (constant region)
hotspots.detail: The stem of the Y; binds to immune cell receptors.
